events.title: Roadside Villager
events.text: A villager waves you down from the roadside. "Please, traveler. Bandits took my cart just ahead. Help me, and I'll share what they stole."

help.message: You drive off the bandits but take a few cuts. The villager shares 30 gold.

ignore.message: You keep walking. The villager's voice fades behind you.

events.title: Travelling Merchant
events.text: A merchant with a heavy pack nods at you. "I carry rare goods from distant schools. Care to trade?"

trade.message: The merchant spreads out wares of unusual quality.

leave.message: You nod politely and move on.

events.title: Shrine Offering
events.text: A weathered roadside shrine still burns with incense. The air hums with martial intent.

gold.message: The shrine glows. A technique crystallizes in your mind.

blood.message: Blood stains the stone. Knowledge floods your thoughts.

leave.message: You bow and continue on your way.

events.title: Drunken Master
events.text: An old man sits on a rock, sipping from a gourd. "Think you're fast? Press J three times in rhythm. Get it right and I'll teach you something."

pass.message: The old man grins. "Not bad." He shares a secret technique.

fail.message: The old man cracks your forehead with his gourd. "Too slow!"

decline.message: The old man shrugs and takes another sip.

events.title: Bandit Camp
events.text: Smoke rises from behind the trees. A bandit camp lies ahead, poorly guarded but full of stolen supplies.

sneak.message: You slip past without a sound.

infiltrate.message: You charge in. The bandits scramble for weapons.

events.title: Abandoned Scroll
events.text: A scroll lies half-buried in the dirt, its seal broken. The calligraphy describes a martial technique.

read.message: You study the scroll's teachings. A new technique takes root.
